name: Black Truffle Brown Butter Souffle Waffle
description: A Michelin-inspired waffle with a crisp caramelized exterior and airy souffle interior, layered with brown butter, black truffle, maple gastrique, and hazelnut texture.
keywords: waffle, truffle, brown butter, fine dining, gourmet, souffle waffle

steps.instruction: Prepare brown butter by heating unsalted butter until milk solids turn amber and aromatic. Strain and cool.
In a saucepan, reduce maple syrup, vinegar, star anise, and salt until a light syrup consistency forms. Remove star anise and set aside.
Toast hazelnuts, coat in caramelized sugar, cool, then grind into a fine dust.
Whisk flour, cornstarch, baking powder, and salt in a bowl.
In another bowl, whisk egg yolks with sugar until pale, then add milk, vanilla, truffle, and brown butter.
Combine wet and dry ingredients gently until just incorporated.
Whip egg whites to soft peaks and fold into batter in three stages to maintain airiness.
Cook batter in a preheated waffle iron until deep golden and crisp.
Plate waffle with whipped cr�me fra�che, drizzle maple gastrique, and finish with hazelnut dust, truffle shavings, and microgreens.

winePairings.name: Sauternes
winePairings.notes: Sweet botrytized wine balancing the truffle richness with acidity and honeyed depth.

winePairings.name: Champagne Brut Blanc de Blancs
winePairings.notes: High acidity and fine bubbles cut through the richness while enhancing nutty brown butter notes.

steps.instruction: Melt butter over medium heat until milk solids turn golden brown and aromatic, then strain.
Simmer all ingredients until slightly thickened. Remove star anise before serving.
Caramelize sugar, coat hazelnuts, cool completely, then grind into a fine powder.
